What We Do

Amar Media kya karta hai?

We don't just post content. We build brands that sell — consistently, intentionally, and beautifully.

01 — Social Media
Social Media Management

End-to-end Instagram management — content calendar, posting, engagement, community building, and monthly performance reports.

InstagramThreadsLinkedInYouTube
02 — Video
Reels & Video Editing

High-retention short-form video editing with trending hooks, captions, SFX, and platform-native formats built for maximum organic reach.

ReelsShortsCapCutPremiere
03 — Paid Growth
Performance Marketing

Meta Ads, retargeting funnels, Instagram lead gen campaigns — built to lower your CPL and maximise ROAS with real conversion data.

Meta AdsLead GenRetargetingAnalytics
04 — Automation
AI-Powered Automations

Automated content pipelines, AI script generation, Notion content calendars, and Python-based reporting systems — for brands that want to scale without hiring a team.

Claude AINotionPythonZapier
05 — Design
Content Design & Carousels

Scroll-stopping carousels, brand identity systems, visual templates, and poster design — all consistent with your brand language.

CanvaFigmaCarouselsBranding
06 — Full Stack
Full Package — Everything

Strategy + content + editing + ads + automation + reporting. A complete content machine custom-built around your brand's goals and revenue targets.

SMMEditingAdsAutomation

How It Works

Simple. Strategic.
Seamless.

01
We understand your brand

A 30-min strategy call where we map your brand, audience, goals, and current gaps. No templates — everything starts from your specific context.

02
We build your content strategy

Custom content pillars, posting frequency, platform formats, and a 30-day content calendar designed around your sales and growth goals.

03
We execute, you sell

Scripts, carousels, edited reels, and posts produced in batches. AI-augmented for speed, human-reviewed for quality. You focus on your business.

04
Publish & Optimise

We schedule, post, engage, and A/B test formats and hooks. If something isn't working, we iterate fast using real data — not guesswork.

05
Report & Scale

Monthly performance reports with reach, engagement, follower growth, and conversion metrics. We scale what works and cut what doesn't.

Apna Brand अमर Karo
